final_sql:
-- STEP 1: query [kommuner]
SELECT kommunenummer, kommunenavn, omrade
FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune
WHERE kommunenavn ILIKE '%trondheim%';

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 2: query [kvikkleire]
SELECT DISTINCT skredrisikokvikkleireklasse FROM kvikkleire_175185730654415d8841436d0d6999f2.utlosningomr;

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 3: query [matrikkeleneiendomskartteig]
SELECT objid, teigid, kommunenummer, matrikkelnummertekst, omrade
FROM matrikkeleneiendomskartteig_36313fab8faa42d99cb779d86d1ca26d.teig
WHERE kommunenummer = '5001';

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 4: query [kvikkleire]
SELECT objid, skredrisikokvikkleireklasse, omrade
FROM kvikkleire_175185730654415d8841436d0d6999f2.utlosningomr
WHERE skredrisikokvikkleireklasse IN ('5','4');

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 5: spatial_join
-- left_source: 3
-- right_source: 4
-- join_type: "intersects"
-- left_geom: "omrade"
-- right_geom: "omrade"

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 6: aggregate
-- source_step: 5
-- aggregation_type: "min"
-- group_by: ["teigid"]
-- metric_column: "objid_right"
-- metric_as: "min_objid_right"
execution_error: {"executed": false, "error": "tool_execute_sort_step blocked.", "reason": "Step 7 is not part of the finalized plan. Execute only planned step numbers.", "step": 7, "action": "sort"}

1.description: get kommunenummer and geometry for Trondheim municipality

2.description: inspect distinct quick-clay risk classes in utlosningomr

3.description: get parcels (teig) in Trondheim municipality with geometry and teigid

4.description: get quick-clay polygons filtered by the chosen high-risk class (set after step 2) with geometry

5.description: reduce quick-clay polygons to municipality extent by intersecting with municipality geometry

6.description: find parcels that intersect the reduced quick-clay polygons

7.description: collapse to one row per parcel (group by teigid) to deduplicate
